errors.UNAUTHENTICATED: You must be signed in to do that.
errors.FORBIDDEN: You do not have permission to do that.
errors.NOT_FOUND: The requested resource was not found.

errors.CONFLICT: A conflict occurred. Please refresh and try again.
errors.RATE_LIMITED: Too many requests. Please slow down.
errors.COST_LIMIT_EXCEEDED: Usage limit reached. Please upgrade your plan.
